subcodes.first_line: O dearly beloved friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The sign of unity and concord among the friends of Israel and the Furqán hath brought glad-tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز عبدالبهاء اشارت اتحاد و اتفاق یاران اسراایلی و فرقانی سبب بشارت
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @oneness; unity of religion
